The food vacuum cleaner is a device that will be appreciated by every person who cares about extending the freshness of products up to 5 times longer. It is ideal for both dry and wet products. Vacuum-packed products are healthier and have less access to bacteria. The operation of the vacuum welding machine is very simple. Its basic function is to draw air inside the foil bag and thus vacuum the food products. Such packaging extends the life and shelf life of food. Most fresh vegetables can be kept in the fridge for about 5 days, but vacuum-packed vegetables can be extended to 20 days. The same applies to meat. Normally they can be stored for a maximum of 2-3 days. They will keep fresh for 9 days when vacuum packed. Hermetically sealed meat can be stored in the freezer for up to two years. items.desc: Utánfutó kiegészítő MULTIPA 161/251 ráfutófék porvédő:Rubber cap, dust cap for AL-KO type 161/251 ramp brakes. The rubber sleeve is designed to protect the pulling tube of the AL-KO 161S and 251S ramp brake from weather…
items.raw_desc: Utánfutó kiegészítő MULTIPA 161/251 ráfutófék porvédő:Rubber cap, dust cap for AL-KO type 161/251 ramp brakes. The rubber sleeve is designed to protect the pulling tube of the AL-KO 161S and 251S ramp brake from weather and dirt. We recommend replacing a cracked or otherwise damaged cuff as soon as possible. Otherwise, a rusted or dirty towing tube will quickly damage the ramp brake bushings. The rear circular hole of the cuff is fitted with a protrusion on the inside for inserting the cuff into the groove of the ramp brake sleeve (the diameter of the sleeve inside the groove is 60 mm). The front part of the cuff is specially shaped to surround the ball coupling mounted on the towing tube. There are two tabs on the side of the cuff designed to thread the cuff over the head and nut of the rear coupling bolt. The total length of the cuff in the extended working position on the ramp brake is approx. 12.5 cm. Dimensions:  56 mm (diameter 1) x 60 mm (diameter 2) x 125 mm ( length )
